src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Replace direct EntityManager creation via JpaUtil with injection of EntityManagerService to improve testability and decoupling.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Changed constructor to accept EntityManagerService and replaced JpaUtil.createEntityManager() calls with service.createEntityManager().

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Simplify finally blocks by removing null checks for EntityManager and EntityTransaction since they are now guaranteed to be initialized.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Removed 'if (em != null)' and 'if (tx != null)' checks before closing or rolling back resources.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Add comprehensive Javadoc comments to the class and its public methods to improve documentation.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Added block comments describing CRUD operations, constructor parameters, and method return values.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Add a standard file header comment with project information and license reference.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.human_impl: Inserted a multi-line comment at the top of the file referencing the GitHub repository.

Add a helper constructor to initialize entity fields directly.

Add method to delete employees by ID range using bulk JPQL delete with transaction management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to support Jakarta EE 9+ (Tomcat 10.1).
Replace javax.servlet jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api to support Jakarta EE 9+.
Replace javax.servlet jstl implementation with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl implementation.
Remove explicit dependency on javax.annotation-api, likely relying on Jakarta EE 9+ built-in annotations or removing usage.
Upgrade Hibernate ORM core from 6.1.3.Final to 6.4.2.Final.
Upgrade PostgreSQL JDBC driver from 42.4.1 to 42.7.1.
Upgrade Maven WAR plugin from 3.3.2 to 3.4.0.
Remove JUnit, AssertJ, Tomcat JNDI, and Tomcat DBCP test dependencies as testing was removed.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed dependencies for junit-jupiter-engine, assertj-core, tomcat8jndi, tomcat-dbcp

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the migration to Java 21, Tomcat 10.1, and Hibernate 6.4.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Java EE integration with DBMS via JPA' with a detailed list including 'Java 21', 'Apache Tomcat 10.1', and 'Hibernate ORM 6.4'.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for configuring the PostgreSQL JDBC resource in Tomcat.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'As JDBC resource, access to PostgreSQL is assumed' with instructions to place JDBC jar in Tomcat lib and configure context.xml.
